---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
wd_path <- normalizePath(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(wd_path)
gap <- 100
base_plot_folder <- paste0("../plots/1_26/fluctuating_env_gap_", gap, "/")
r_data_folder <- "../r_data/fluctuate_env"
if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
hcl_color_palette <- "Dark 2" 
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
data_df <- readRDS(paste0(r_data_folder, "/data_summary_gap_", gap, ".rds"))
```

```{r}
data_df <- summary_stat_df
```

```{r}
data_df$fitness_mean_norm <- data_df$fitness_mean / 0.0087186
data_df$fitness_sd_norm <- data_df$fitness_sd / 0.0005019642
data_df$a_z_diff <- data_df$z_mean - data_df$a_mean
```

```{r}
colname = c("a_z_diff")  # column to plot
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"), "/")

ltys = c(1, 2) # per ycol: solid, dashed

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

# sz=60
# n=50
for (n in c(2,8,20,50)){
  # for (gap in c(1,10,100)){
    for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)){
  for (reg in c("fit", "ext", "ave")){
      # for (reg in c("fit")){
        # for (opt in c(0, sz)){
          filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz, fluctuate_gap = gap)
          filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz, fluctuate_gap = gap)
          filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = sz, fluctuate_gap = gap)
          png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          title <- paste0(
          if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
              if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
              if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                  if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
          " model (n = ", n, ")"
          )
          
          par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

          plot_lines_multi(
              df      = data_df,
              filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
              ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
              labels  = list(
                  title = title,
                  x = "Generation",
                  y = expression(bar(z) ~ "-" ~ bar(a))      # or any y label you want
              ),
              show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
              cols = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[1],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[3]
              ),
              ylim = c(-1 * as.integer(sz/2)-10, as.integer(sz/2) +10),
              xlim = c(10000, 10300),
              # xcol = "dz1_pred"
             ltys = ltys
          )
          
          # abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
                                          function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
          legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
              col = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[1],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[3]
              ),
              lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
          dev.off()
        # }
      }
    }
  }
# }
```

```{r}
colname = c("z_mean", "z_sd")  # column to plot
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"), "/")
print(plot_folder)
ltys = c(1, 2) # per ycol: solid, dashed

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
gap=100
sz=60
n=50
# for (n in c(2,8,20,50)){
#   # for (gap in c(1,10,100)){
#     for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)){
  for (reg in c("fit", "ext", "ave")){
      # for (reg in c("fit")){
        # for (opt in c(0, sz)){
          filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          # filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, "_opt_", opt, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          # filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, tick = 10000)
          # filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, tick = 10000)
          # filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, tick = 10000)
          # png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          title <- paste0(
          if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
              if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
              if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                  if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
          " model (n = ", n, ")"
          )
          par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1))

          plot_lines_mean_sd_band(
              df      = data_df,
              filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
              mean_col    = colname[1],  # << choose the column to plot
              sd_col      = colname[2],
              labels  = list(
                  title = title,
                  x = "Generation",
                  y = "Value"      # or any y label you want
              ),
              show_rep = FALSE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
              cols = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1]
              ),
              # ylim = c(0.0035, 0.0095),
              xlim = c(10050, 10300),
              # xcol = "dz1_pred"
            #  ltys = ltys
          )
          
          # abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
                                          function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
          legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
              col = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1]
              ),
              lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
          dev.off()
        # }
      }
#     }
#   # }
# }
```

```{r}
data_df$z_a_diff <- data_df$z_mean - data_df$a_mean
```
